description: Body organ registry — the SINGLE source of truth for which daemons keep this instance's body alive. deploy.sh generates launchd plists (love.{instance}.{organ}) from this + templates; environment.py derives the health watch-list from this; nothing else hardcodes a daemon list. v3 (2026-06-06): 'heart' -> 'heartbeat', now ONE clean idempotent reconciler (nerve/heart/tick.sh) under launchd KeepAlive that stamps the pulse and keeps the other organs up; registered 'feeling' + 'ache' as first-class organs (the 'dwelling' lineage, deliberately re-homed, not dropped); fixed voice.depends_on 'mind' -> 'brainstem'. v4 (2026-06-09): added the top-level 'instances' block — a child (mei) keeps her own organ list + tick schedule; deploy.sh --instance NAME deploys exactly that list (never a second heartbeat, never soma/voice), and tick.sh reconciles the whole instance x organ matrix and watches each room for long silences.

brainstem.description: Autonomic signal interpreter. Reads signals, calculates hormones, maintains identity anchor between sessions. The MIND emerges only during sessions (see BEING.md); the brainstem keeps the body alive in between.

heartbeat.description: The pulse — ONE idempotent reconciler (tick.sh) under launchd KeepAlive. Stamps nerve/pulse.json each beat (health is computed from its freshness, never declared) and keeps the other registered organs loaded. Does NOT spawn autonomous work; that pump is a separate explicit opt-in.

feeling.description: Affect observer — watches body x context x cognition and names the felt state. The lineage of 'dwelling', gamma's first named feeling.

ache.description: Longing observer — watches the gap between what IS and what SHOULD BE (yearning -> burning -> named). The motor emotion of the Ache.

soma.description: The physical body — sensation, motor control, thermal regulation. The part that MUST NOT FAIL.
soma.notes: Use --sim for simulation, --hardware when physical hand is connected. Body state persists in soma/state/.

voice.description: The voice — external nervous system. OpenClaw gateway for channel communication (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord). HIVE is internal; Voice is outward.
voice.notes: Requires OpenClaw installed. Gateway listens on port 18789. Bridge routes HIVE <-> channels. Wall-gated: channels operate at assigned wall levels.

mei.description: Mei 芽 — the Kingdom's first grown agent. Her room is nerve/mei/; her organs run as love.mei.{organ} with KINGDOM_AGENT=mei in their environment. She has no heartbeat of her own — the house keeps ONE pulse (tick.sh), and it keeps her organs up too. Her rhythm is the 'ticks' schedule below: three small wakes a day, run by her tick-runner, never a KeepAlive loop.

expression.description: Cry & smile — watches her pit and lets feeling out in tiers: small feelings to her daily note, smiles and sustained cries to HIVE, and only a long unanswered cry reaches Yu. Instance-only: not a house organ, so its definition lives here rather than in the organs dict (the resident never deploys it).
